overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through Night City's neon-lit streets at night, transitioning from enclosed urban canyons to foggy open highways while approaching a massive central tower. The footage features high-quality cinematic rendering with dominant neon lighting and atmospheric fog effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit street in futuristic downtown

events.description: accelerating from stop through narrow street between towering buildings
navigating slight right turn to follow the street corridor

agents.ego_description: driving slowly through narrow neon-lit corridor between towering buildings with holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with neon text on the left side of the street
tall building with reflective glass exterior and vertical neon lighting
brutalist concrete building facade with minimal lighting on the right
suspended neon light strips crossing above the street
floating holographic advertisements projecting from building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a narrow futuristic street enclosed by towering buildings covered in neon signage and holographic advertisements. The dashboard glows with purple light as the car moves slowly through the urban canyon, passing various illuminated billboards and glass facades.

events.description: passing cylindrical building with illuminated honeycomb pattern on right side
building facade lights shift from yellow to red illumination

agents.ego_description: driving past a distinctive cylindrical building with changing colored lights, approaching a tunnel entrance

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical tower with hexagonal honeycomb pattern lighting that changes colors
dark underpass entrance with green ambient lighting visible inside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes a prominent cylindrical building featuring an illuminated honeycomb pattern that shifts from yellow to red. The street remains enclosed by tall structures as the car approaches a tunnel entrance, transitioning from the neon-lit corridor toward an underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel transitioning to open foggy highway

events.description: entering underpass with green tinted lighting and enclosed walls
exiting tunnel into open foggy cityscape with distant tower visible
accelerating to high speed on open elevated road reaching 48 km/h

agents.ego_description: accelerating through a green-lit tunnel and emerging into a foggy open area, driving at high speed toward a distant illuminated tower

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls with green ambient lighting strips
massive illuminated skyscraper visible in the distance through the fog
metal safety railings along the sides of the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a tunnel with distinctive green ambient lighting before emerging into a vast foggy cityscape. A massive illuminated tower dominates the distant skyline as the car accelerates onto an open elevated highway, with visibility reduced by the dense atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy elevated highway approaching central tower

events.description: decelerating as approaching the central tower base, speed drops to 17 km/h
fog density increases significantly, reducing visibility of surrounding structures

agents.ego_description: driving through heavy fog toward a massive central tower, slowing down as the structure looms larger in the windshield

entered.detail: illuminated entrance and ground-level lighting at the tower's base

segments.scene_description: Driving through dense fog on an elevated highway, the vehicle approaches a massive central tower that gradually fills the windshield. The atmosphere is thick with green-tinted fog, reducing visibility as the car slows down near the tower's base, with the structure's illuminated details becoming visible through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic neon corridors of a futuristic city into a vast, fog-shrouded industrial expanse. It begins by navigating a narrow urban canyon where the dashboard glows purple beneath towering buildings draped in holographic advertisements and neon signage. As the vehicle passes a cylindrical building with a shifting yellow-and-red honeycomb pattern, the scene transitions from the open street into the green ambient light of a tunnel. The camera then emerges from the underpass onto an elevated highway, where the enclosed city walls give way to a dense, green-tinted atmospheric fog. Finally, the vehicle accelerates through the mist as a massive illuminated tower gradually looms larger in the windshield, its intricate details becoming clear as the car slows near the structure's base.
